author: Brian Pridgen
name: Context-Repair SmearGate+BigramHash MLP3 int6+zstd
blurb: Dense 9-layer 512-dim GQA with SmearGate + BigramHash context features, MLP_MULT=3, int6+zstd export with fp16 embedding passthrough. Developed entirely through AI agent coordination by a surgeon with no ML engineering background. Context features independently identified through arXiv literature survey (200+ papers). Diagnosed a carried-context failure surface and repaired it with paired context features validated through controlled canary experiments.
